messages.content: You generate only valid python-pptx code. Use XL_CHART_TYPE (not ChartType) for charts; guard slide.shapes.title for None; return only complete runnable Python code without Markdown fences or section headings.

Build a commercial real estate proposal presentation aimed at investors. Output the file as 'Metro_Tower_Proposal.pptx', use English language content, and configure the slides to 16:9 Widescreen landscape orientation. The aesthetic should be elegant minimalist with high contrast black and white themes. You are strictly prohibited from using external APIs or web scraping; embed all necessary data directly in your script. When generating charts, you must use XL_CHART_TYPE instead of ChartType. Furthermore, always verify that slide.shapes.title is not None before setting its .text value.

from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE
import os


# ── Deck Constants ───────────────────────────────────────────────

SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(10.0)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(5.625)
OUTPUT_FILE = "Metro_Tower_Proposal.pptx"

BLACK = RGBColor(0, 0, 0)
WHITE = RGBColor(255, 255, 255)
LIGHT_GRAY = RGBColor(245, 245, 245)
MID_GRAY = RGBColor(204, 204, 204)
ACCENT_GOLD = RGBColor(200, 169, 110)

FONT_HEADING = "Arial"
FONT_BODY = "Calibri"

LEFT_MARGIN = Inches(0.75)
RIGHT_MARGIN = Inches(0.75)
TOP_MARGIN = Inches(0.5)
BOTTOM_MARGIN = Inches(0.4)


# ── Helpers ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────

def hex_to_rgb(hex_str):
    h = hex_str.lstrip("#")
    return RGBColor(int(h[0:2], 16), int(h[2:4], 16), int(h[4:6], 16))


def set_slide_background(slide, color_hex="#FFFFFF"):
    bg = slide.background
    fill = bg.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=14, bold=False, color=None, alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = alignment
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text
    run.font.name = FONT_BODY if not bold else FONT_HEADING
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.bold = bold
    run.font.color.rgb = color or BLACK
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, bg_color=None, border_color=None):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    if bg_color:
        shape.fill.solid()
        shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = bg_color
    else:
        shape.fill.background()
    if border_color:
        shape.line.color.rgb = border_color
        shape.line.width = Pt(1.5)
    else:
        shape.line.fill.background()
    return shape


def add_section_label(slide, label_text, left=LEFT_MARGIN, top=TOP_MARGIN):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, Inches(3), Inches(0.4))
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = label_text.upper()
    run.font.name = FONT_HEADING
    run.font.size = Pt(10)
    run.font.bold = True
    run.font.color.rgb = ACCENT_GOLD
    return txBox


def add_footer(slide, page_number):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(8.5), Inches(5.2), Inches(1.3), Inches(0.3))
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = str(page_number)
    run.font.name = FONT_BODY
    run.font.size = Pt(9)
    run.font.color.rgb = MID_GRAY


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, path, left, top, width, height):
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, left, top, width, height)
    else:
        shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
        shape.fill.solid()
        shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = LIGHT_GRAY
        shape.line.color.rgb = MID_GRAY
        shape.line.width = Pt(1)


# ── Slide Builders ───────────────────────────────────────────────

def slide_0_title(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])  # Blank layout
    set_slide_background(slide, "#0A0A0A")

    add_text_box(
        slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(1.8), Inches(7), Inches(1.2),
        "METRO TOWER", font_size=48, bold=True, color=WHITE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER
    )

    add_text_box(
        slide, Inches(2.0), Inches(3.0), Inches(6), Inches(0.5),
        "A Landmark Commercial Development in the Heart of Downtown", font_size=18, bold=False, color=MID_GRAY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER
    )

    add_text_box(
        slide, Inches(2.5), Inches(3.7), Inches(5), Inches(0.4),
        "Investor Proposal — Q1 2025", font_size=14, bold=False, color=ACCENT_GOLD, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER
    )

    add_footer(slide, "1")


def slide_1_market_overview(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = ""
    add_section_label(slide, "Market Overview")

    # Title
    add_text_box(
        slide, LEFT_MARGIN, Inches(1.0), Inches(8.5), Inches(0.6),
        "Downtown Office Market — Strong Fundamentals", font_size=24, bold=True, color=BLACK
    )

    # Three stat cards in a row
    card_width = Inches(2.3)
    card_height = Inches(1.4)
    gap = Inches(0.25)
    start_x = (SLIDE_WIDTH - 3 * card_width - 2 * gap) / 2

    stats = [
        ("96%", "Occupancy Rate", "Above market average"),
        ("4.2%", "Rental Growth", "Year-over-year increase"),
        ("180K", "Leased Sq Ft", "In the past 12 months"),
    ]

    for i, (value, label, desc) in enumerate(stats):
        x = start_x + i * (card_width + gap)
        y = Inches(1.9)
        card = add_card(slide, x, y, card_width, card_height, bg_color=LIGHT_GRAY, border_color=MID_GRAY)

        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.2), y + Inches(0.15), card_width - Inches(0.4), Inches(0.6),
                     value, font_size=32, bold=True, color=BLACK, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.2), y + Inches(0.7), card_width - Inches(0.4), Inches(0.35),
                     label, font_size=12, bold=False, color=MID_GRAY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.2), y + Inches(1.05), card_width - Inches(0.4), Inches(0.3),
                     desc, font_size=9, bold=False, color=MID_GRAY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    # Market drivers text
    add_text_box(
        slide, LEFT_MARGIN, Inches(3.6), Inches(8.5), Inches(1.2),
        "The downtown submarket continues to attract institutional capital driven by limited new supply, strong tenant demand from technology and financial services firms, and a 96% occupancy rate that exceeds the national average of 87%. Prime Class-A rents have appreciated 4.2% year-over-year.", font_size=13, bold=False, color=BLACK
    )

    add_footer(slide, "2")


def slide_2_project_details(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#0A0A0A")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = ""
    add_section_label(slide, "Project Overview", top=Inches(0.3))

    add_text_box(
        slide, LEFT_MARGIN, Inches(0.7), Inches(8.5), Inches(0.6),
        "Metro Tower — 42-Story Mixed-Use Development", font_size=24, bold=True, color=WHITE
    )

    # Four feature cards in 2x2 grid
    card_w = Inches(3.7)
    card_h = Inches(1.5)
    gap_x = Inches(0.3)
    gap_y = Inches(0.3)
    start_x = (SLIDE_WIDTH - 2 * card_w - gap_x) / 2

    features = [
        ("42 Stories", "Class-A Office Space\nTotal: 680,000 sq ft"),
        ("Retail Podium", "15,000 sq ft of premium\nretail and dining space"),
        ("Parking Garage", "800-space underground\nparking facility"),
        ("Amenities", "Rooftop terrace, fitness center,\nconference facilities"),
    ]

    for idx, (title_text, body_text) in enumerate(features):
        col = idx % 2
        row = idx // 2
        x = start_x + col * (card_w + gap_x)
        y = Inches(1.6) + row * (card_h + gap_y)

        card = add_card(slide, x, y, card_w, card_h, bg_color=RGBColor(30, 30, 30), border_color=MID_GRAY)

        # Accent line at top of card
        accent_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, x + Inches(0.15), y + Inches(0.08), Inches(0.6), Pt(2))
        accent_shape.fill.solid()
        accent_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = ACCENT_GOLD
        accent_shape.line.fill.background()

        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.15), y + Inches(0.3), card_w - Inches(0.3), Inches(0.4),
                     title_text, font_size=16, bold=True, color=WHITE)
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.15), y + Inches(0.75), card_w - Inches(0.3), Inches(0.6),
                     body_text, font_size=12, bold=False, color=MID_GRAY)

    # Location info at bottom
    add_text_box(
        slide, LEFT_MARGIN, Inches(4.5), Inches(8.5), Inches(0.5),
        "Location: 1200 Main Street, Downtown Financial District — Direct access to metro station and major highways", font_size=11, bold=False, color=MID_GRAY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER
    )

    add_footer(slide, "3")


def slide_3_financial_projections(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = ""
    add_section_label(slide, "Financial Projections")

    add_text_box(
        slide, LEFT_MARGIN, Inches(0.7), Inches(8.5), Inches(0.6),
        "Revenue Projection — 5-Year Outlook", font_size=24, bold=True, color=BLACK
    )

    # Bar chart: projected revenue over 5 years
    from pptx.chart.data import CategoryChartData
    chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data.categories = ["2024", "2025", "2026", "2027", "2028"]
    chart_data.add_series("Projected Revenue ($M)", (12.5, 14.8, 17.2, 19.6, 22.3))

    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(
        XL_CHART_TYPE.COLUMN_CLUSTERED,
        Inches(0.7), Inches(1.5), Inches(5.5), Inches(3.0),
        chart_data
    )
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    chart.has_legend = False

    # Style the chart series
    plot = chart.plots[0]
    plot.gap_width = 80
    series = plot.series[0]
    fill = series.format.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = ACCENT_GOLD

    # Chart title
    chart.has_title = True
    chart.chart_title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].text = "Annual Revenue ($M)"
    chart.chart_title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.size = Pt(12)
    chart.chart_title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.bold = False

    # Value axis formatting
    value_axis = chart.value_axis
    value_axis.has_title = True
    value_axis.axis_title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].text = "$ (Millions)"
    value_axis.axis_title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.size = Pt(9)

    category_axis = chart.category_axis
    category_axis.tick_labels.font.size = Pt(10)

    # Three metric cards below the chart
    card_w = Inches(2.3)
    card_h = Inches(1.4)
    gap = Inches(0.25)
    start_x = (SLIDE_WIDTH - 3 * card_w - 2 * gap) / 2

    metrics = [
        ("$8.4M", "Net Operating Income", "Year 3 Projection"),
        ("6.8%", "Cap Rate", "Stabilized Yield"),
        ("14.5%", "IRR", "5-Year Return"),
    ]

    for i, (value, label, desc) in enumerate(metrics):
        x = start_x + i * (card_w + gap)
        y = Inches(4.7)
        card = add_card(slide, x, y, card_w, card_h, bg_color=LIGHT_GRAY, border_color=MID_GRAY)

        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.2), y + Inches(0.15), card_w - Inches(0.4), Inches(0.6),
                     value, font_size=30, bold=True, color=BLACK, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.2), y + Inches(0.7), card_w - Inches(0.4), Inches(0.35),
                     label, font_size=12, bold=False, color=MID_GRAY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.2), y + Inches(1.05), card_w - Inches(0.4), Inches(0.3),
                     desc, font_size=9, bold=False, color=MID_GRAY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_footer(slide, "4")


def slide_4_investment_opportunity(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#0A0A0A")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = ""
    add_section_label(slide, "Investment Opportunity", top=Inches(0.3))

    add_text_box(
        slide, LEFT_MARGIN, Inches(0.7), Inches(8.5), Inches(0.6),
        "Investment Terms & Timeline", font_size=24, bold=True, color=WHITE
    )

    # Left column — Investment terms card
    left_card = add_card(slide, Inches(0.7), Inches(1.5), Inches(4.3), Inches(3.8), bg_color=RGBColor(30, 30, 30), border_color=MID_GRAY)

    terms_items = [
        ("Total Project Cost", "$285 Million"),
        ("Minimum Investment", "$10 Million"),
        ("Equity Structure", "Senior + Mezzanine Tranches"),
        ("Target Hold Period", "7 Years"),
        ("Distribution Waterfall", "8% Pref, 70/30 Split"),
    ]

    y_pos = Inches(1.65)
    for label, value in terms_items:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.0), y_pos, Inches(2.0), Inches(0.3),
                     label, font_size=11, bold=True, color=MID_GRAY)
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(3.0), y_pos, Inches(1.8), Inches(0.3),
                     value, font_size=12, bold=False, color=WHITE)
        y_pos += Inches(0.55)

    # Right column — Timeline visual
    right_card = add_card(slide, Inches(5.4), Inches(1.5), Inches(4.3), Inches(3.8), bg_color=RGBColor(30, 30, 30), border_color=MID_GRAY)

    timeline_items = [
        ("Q2 2025", "Ground Breaking"),
        ("Q4 2026", "Structure Topped Out"),
        ("Q1 2028", "Leasing Milestone — 75%"),
        ("Q3 2029", "Substantial Completion"),
        ("Q1 2030", "Exit / Refinance"),
    ]

    y_pos = Inches(1.65)
    for label, value in timeline_items:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(5.7), y_pos, Inches(1.8), Inches(0.3),
                     label, font_size=11, bold=True, color=ACCENT_GOLD)
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(7.4), y_pos, Inches(2.0), Inches(0.3),
                     value, font_size=12, bold=False, color=WHITE)
        y_pos += Inches(0.55)

    # Horizontal accent line between columns
    line_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(4.9), Inches(1.6), Pt(1), Inches(3.6))
    line_shape.fill.solid()
    line_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = ACCENT_GOLD
    line_shape.line.fill.background()

    add_footer(slide, "5")


def slide_5_closing(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = ""
    add_section_label(slide, "Thank You")

    # Centered contact block
    add_text_box(
        slide, Inches(2.5), Inches(1.0), Inches(5), Inches(0.8),
        "Metro Tower Development Group", font_size=32, bold=True, color=BLACK, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER
    )

    # Decorative line
    line_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(4.0), Inches(1.9), Inches(2), Pt(2))
    line_shape.fill.solid()
    line_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = ACCENT_GOLD
    line_shape.line.fill.background()

    contact_items = [
        "1200 Main Street, Suite 4500",
        "Downtown Financial District, NY 10007",
        "+1 (212) 555-0198",
        "investors@metrotower.com",
        "www.metrotower.com",
    ]

    y_pos = Inches(2.3)
    for item in contact_items:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(2.5), y_pos, Inches(5), Inches(0.35),
                     item, font_size=14, bold=False, color=MID_GRAY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
        y_pos += Inches(0.4)

    # Disclaimer at bottom
    add_text_box(
        slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(4.8), Inches(7), Inches(0.5),
        "This presentation is for informational purposes only and does not constitute an offer to sell securities.", font_size=9, bold=False, color=MID_GRAY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER
    )

    add_footer(slide, "6")


# ── Main ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

def main():
    prs = Presentation()
    prs.slide_width = SLIDE_WIDTH
    prs.slide_height = SLIDE_HEIGHT

    slide_0_title(prs)
    slide_1_market_overview(prs)
    slide_2_project_details(prs)
    slide_3_financial_projections(prs)
    slide_4_investment_opportunity(prs)
    slide_5_closing(prs)

    prs.save(OUTPUT_FILE)


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
